title: Are they platforms with proven profits
author: TinyDifference7642
selftext:
Just diving into the field looking to do some research on platforms and their history of profits attained does anyone have any resources on platforms that use ai to passively trade in crypto and traditional stocks, etc... 

I've noticed that as such with crypto there have been numerous scam platforms besides the obvious what should one look for one trying to vet a platforms.

Thanks in advance for any information.
